text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, listen. You're not busy, are you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, lunchtime, I want you at the<n>cafeteria!
Pumpkin pie's on the menu,<n>and we're gonna get
some.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Get ready to wait in a looong line, and<n>make sure
you have a clean plate and<n>fork with you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Once you get me a slice... Well, I<n>wouldn't mind
letting you eat half.
